name: Okta Admin with App-Owner-Like Access
description: Detects users who hold Okta admin roles and also have user app assignments that appear owner/admin scoped.
query: SELECT DISTINCT r.user_id AS id, COALESCE(u.login, r.user_login, r.user_id) AS account_name, r.role_type, r.role_label, a.app_id, COALESCE(a.app_label, app.label, app.name) AS app_name FROM okta_admin_roles r JOIN okta_app_assignments a ON a.assignee_id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN okta_users u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN okta_applications app ON app.id = a.app_id WHERE UPPER(COALESCE(a.assignee_type, '')) = 'USER' AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, 'active')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND LOWER(COALESCE(a.status, 'active')) IN ('active', 'assigned') AND LOWER(COALESCE(a.app_label, app.label, app.name, '')) RLIKE '.*(owner|admin|administrator).*'
remediation: Separate high-risk duty combinations by removing app-owner-like assignments from users who already hold Okta admin roles.
